title: Rurouni Kenshin - 37-40 [VHS 480p][HECTO Fansub][015E5A8F].mkv
description:
Back at it again with another HECTO Rurouni Kenshin tape, this one a rental? bootleg distributed by HOT RAMEN VIDEO. This tape was in much worse condition than 33-36. The colors are wildly fucked, the video bounces around a ton, someone cut out all of the bonuses and credits, and I was forced to unplug one audio cable and record in mono, because while the label said it was Hi-Fi Stereo, what that meant was that they recorded nothing but loud static to the right audio channel. One could argue that this only adds to the experience of HECTO Fansub Rurouni Kenshin though. This is still all I have from the show though outside of some 352x240 Shinsen Gumi DivX3 encodes of random episodes, so I'd be interested in seeing any other tapes uploaded. Just remember, "Full Retail Value Will Be Collected If This Protective Seal Is Altered Or Removed." and "No rental and for sale."

title: 日本語で考えたくなる科学の問い〈上〉〔文化と社会篇〕
description:
**日本語で考えたくなる科学の問い〈上〉〔文化と社会篇〕：探求・活動型日本語教科書【英語・中国語・韓国語・ベトナム語の本文翻訳付き】**

![alt text](https://c.media-amazon.com/images/I/61njjsk+OrL._SL1000_.jpg)

**世界の学術研究が示す"多彩なテーマ"と"興味深い発見"をもとに、 「調べる・考える・伝える」ための新しい探求・活動型日本語教科書**

現代の地球社会には、環境問題、格差や貧困の問題、そして、災害や紛争、感染症の問題など、多くの危機的な問題が横たわっています。グローバル化・ボーダレス化した時代において、世界の人々が国境や分野の枠を越えて協力し合い課題に取り組むことが不可欠な時代を迎えていると言えます。学校での勉強や研究、そして、企業で働く上でも、自然科学・社会科学・人文科学の幅広い素養が必要とされ、それは、日本語で勉学や仕事に取り組みたいと思っている学習者の方々にも言えることでしょう。重要なのは、単なる知識ではなく、科学的なセンスを持って探求・対話・協働することです。
以上の考えに基づき作成された本書では、学術研究を紹介する文章を題材に「調べ・考え・伝える」104のアクティビティと、コーパスに基づく総計333の語彙と文法を学ぶことができ、豊富な解説と練習問題を通して総合的な日本語コミュニケーション能力を育成することができます。
[育成される資質・能力]

**1 日本語で他者と対話・協働・表現する力**
ナビゲーターである博士、アイ、リクが、興味深い“科学の問い"をテーマにした講義に読者の皆さんを案内します。 人の作り出す「文化と社会」に関する深い議論や、緻密な調査に触れ、さまざまなアクティビティを通して 調べる、考える、対話する活動に取り組むことによって、日本語で他者と対話・協働・表現する力を養うことができます。

**2 学術的活動に不可欠なアカデミック・ジャパニーズ**
本書での読解やアクティビティを構成する語彙や表現は『日本語学術共通語彙リスト』 『日本語能力試験出題基準』『制作チームオリジナル語彙リスト』などのコーパスやデータベースに基づき 科学的に導き出されたものです。学術的活動に不可欠なアカデミック・ジャパニーズの力を 総計333の語彙と文型、文法を学ぶことで身につけることができます。

**3 理論的・実践的な知見に基づく総合的な日本語コミュニケーション能力**
充実したことばの意味や用法に関する解説、そして、日本語の構造や運用に着目した 文法コラムを通して、日本語の語彙や表現、文法をより適切に理解し、実際の コミュニケーション場面で豊かに運用する力を育成することができます。

title: [Orphan] Garden of Remembrance (1080p)
description:
From noted anime director Yamada Naoko (*A Silent Voice*, *The Colors Within*) and Science Saru comes a new anime short, *Garden of Remembrance*. Released in Japan on August 30, 2024, it is an impressionistic piece about love lost and love remembered. The protagonist is a young girl who seems stuck in her daily routine:

![screencap](https://blogger.googleusercontent.com/img/b/R29vZ2xl/AVvXsEg35qRmz5Ri6nl4gqawTk0KIMdQhJ29U0x7OC6MAyrMHkPlfz5ChbYHwu9qO9i8C0jsTLpP1yao-MNjsHPEuAP5cou-STRFLGEqO8Q44FHIKIQ8dlXVvm-FvtYmCJwQriCi8mkYyqTSb2jfOLhfk-OT9DSp8zpO3Aa44vOCdKsE1VZ_-U7VQr588OmTFw05/s1920/garden-amazon_001_3136.png)

When the gates of memory burst open, the film becomes a riot of color and design:

![screencap](https://blogger.googleusercontent.com/img/b/R29vZ2xl/AVvXsEjtIPfvn5Oq1YjTiLHaC4VzuJBMzyLjlECOqUEHpjnGECJJT4olVBCCNLucbA6qoRMITOvcNl3Ibre3-OPGdf2NgswY8aLKKudzITheg-3nnwMNeiLB8CZDwHG9aYmMlXvJFN8yqIqpaup_IaTEFv5lPAPAkIRmpzSzpZV4O8yv1oqJVxD3k_2zXilX18ax/s1920/garden-amazon_001_16967.png)

The film has no dialog, only music and a melancholic song. As with the other (very rare) real-time Orphan projects, Skr did the heavy lifting. See [this blog entry](https://collectr.blogspot.com/2024/09/garden-of-remembrance.html) for more details and full staff credits.

This release, and all Orphan releases, are available for direct download from IRC bot Orphan|Arutha in channels #nibl or #news on irc.rizon.net.

Japanese Soundtracks + Covers and Inserts
Laserdisc Covers and Inserts
DVD Covers and Inserts
VHS Covers
Japanese Movie Poster

Description: This collection of Transformers The Movie contains all known versions of the film in the Japanese Market. The Japanese dub in VHS format contains additional title cards for each of the main characters of the film which is omitted in the DVD version. Additionally we have included an English subtitled version of the promotional VHS cassette Transformers: The Movie - Apocalypse, The Matrix Forever. This promotional video contains trailers, commercials and openings for all the Transformers series that aired in Japan on TV. When this was initially released, Transformers Victory was still airing in Japan. We hope our fans around the world will enjoy these translations offered for the first time ever to English speaking audiences.

[内容紹介]
BUMP OF CHICKEN、約5年ぶり10枚目のフルアルバム

BUMP OF CHICKEN の約5年ぶり、通算10枚目となるフルアルバムがついにリリース決定! 『ポケモンスペシャルミュージックビデオ GOTCHA! 』のテーマソングとして世界中で話題となった「アカシア」、NHK 連続テレビ小説『おかえりモネ』主題歌の「なないろ」、劇場版『名探偵コナン ハロウィンの花嫁』の主題歌「クロノスタシス」、大人気TVアニメ『SPY×FAMILY』第2クールオープニング主題歌の「SOUVENIR」、 NHK『18祭』のテーマソングとして制作され日本中を感動で包んだ「窓の中から」、今春大注目の映画『陰陽師0』主題歌の「邂逅」など、数々の素晴らしい作品を彩ってきたこの5年間のドキュメンタリーといえる楽曲たちを余すところなく収録予定。さらに初回盤にはバンド結成28周年を記念し開催され、大反響・大盛況のうちに幕を閉じた全国アリーナツアー「BUMP OF CHICKEN TOUR ホームシック衛星2024」のファイナル公演を映像化して収録。ファン垂涎のアイテムになること間違いなしの超強力パッケージとなっている。

[内容紹介]

約3年ぶりとなる、11枚目のオリジナルアルバム『QUARTER CENTURY』。
結成25周年を迎えたコブクロが、四半世紀活動してきた集大成として送り出す自信作。
dip CMソング「Days」、大阪・関西万博オフィシャルテーマソング「この地球（ほし）の続きを」、テレビ朝日系金曜ナイトドラマ『リエゾン－こどものこころ診療所－』主題歌「エンベロープ」の他に、2022年の全国ツアーで初披露されていた「Mr.GLORY」「雨粒と花火」「足跡」を遂に音源化。
その他、ライブで披露し好評を博したリアレンジ楽曲から「ベテルギウス- Over the GLORY DAYS -」、インディーズから歌い続ける「Moon Light Party!!」を新たにレコーディングし収録。

ファン待望の25th Anniversary Song「RAISE THE ANCHOR」など新曲3曲と、布袋寅泰とのコラボレーション楽曲「Soul to Soul (布袋寅泰 feat. コブクロ)」を含めた全12曲を収録！！

**Описание:**
Планета Флид подверглась разрушительной атаке флота Веги. Принц планеты Дюк Флид бежал на Землю, захватив с собой Грендайзера, инопланетного демона. Однако упав на планету, он потерял памяти. Его подобрал доктор Амон, глава Центра изучения космоса, усыновил и дал ему Дайске. Юноша начинает жить спокойной мирной жизнью, но однажды над большими городами по всему миру появляются загадочные объекты. Силы Веги начинают атаку на Землю...

**Дополнительная информация:**
Товарищи деды, настало время сводить олдскулы! Перед нами главный не исекай релиз летнего сезона - ремейк UFO Robo Grendizer, которого мы все так любили смотреть в детстве, да не от абы кого а от команды Fukushima Gainax а режиссирует Фукуда Мицуо приложивший свою руку к Гандамам и многим другим аниме жанра меха и подвести не должен. **Перевод  #1:** Профессиональный (закадровый) | [Dream Cast](https://vk.com/jamfans/)
**Перевод  #2:** Профессиональный (закадровый) | [AniLibria.TV](https://anilibria.tv/)
**Перевод  #3:** Профессиональный (закадровый) | [TVShows](https://flex-kino.com)
**Субтитры:** Русские надписи, русские (софтсаб) | Multi-10

**Описание:**
Бог ветра Сил по ошибке убивает Такуми. В качестве извинений бог отправляет Такуми в мир Этелдия. Однако это малоприятное место, представляющее собой огромный лес, наполненный опасными монстрами... В лесу Такуми находит близнецов — мальчика и девочку. Он беспокоится о малышах, даёт им имена Аллен и Елена и решает заботиться о них. Вскоре оказывается, что дети не так просты и могут победить монстра голыми руками. Добравшись до города, новоиспечённый родитель решает зарегистрироваться в гильдии, чтобы заработать на жизнь. Он начинает свою жизнь как искатель приключений, одновременно заботясь о детях.

title: [Noiy] Patema Inverted (2013) (BD 1080p HEVC Opus Dual-Audio) | Sakasama no Patema
description:
## **The encode is broken. Don't download!**

___

[JPBD](https://nyaa.si/view/1566916) encode by Noiy  
denoise, aa, deband, regrain

[![Patema Inverted](https://s4.anilist.co/file/anilistcdn/media/anime/cover/large/bx12477-KtZm8BuvrPYo.jpg)](https://anilist.co/anime/12477/Patema-Inverted/)

The source is a frac upscale form ~1279.15x719.54, no idea what the kernel is tho (Catrom comes close), so no rescale. There is some slight haloing here and there, but nothing worth dehaloing. Other than that, it suffers from some annoying banding despite all the grain (and some heavy artefacting in some places). I tried to get rid of some of the banding that hides beneath the grain. Probably a wasted effort. But I manually dealt with some of the more heavy banding/artefacting that dared to assault my eyes.

#### **Subtitles:**
- Full Subtitles [Underwater/Watachi] (modified)
- Full Subtitles [Watachi]
- Signs/Songs [Underwater/Watachi] (modified)

Subs sourced from [deanzel](https://nyaa.si/view/713419) (v2). Very minor change/fix to the song styling of the ending.

**[Mediainfo](https://rentry.co/x5pe4b6g/raw)**
**[Comp](https://slow.pics/c/35cImazX)**

slow.pics/vspreview didn't wanna [cooperate](https://i.slow.pics/n177QmWn.webp) so I had some *fun* doing it manually.

title: Weekly K Manga Chapter Updates - Week 36 2024 (Digital) (Rillant)
description:
x1378 native rips obtained directly from [K Manga](https://kmanga.kodansha.com/). 
Spreads joined, otherwise untouched.

**Note:** GALAXIAS chapter 7 is delayed and will be released next week. Could turn into a Witch Hat Atelier situation where the English chapters come a week after the Japanese, we'll have to wait and see.

General info:
* "Why don't you rip X series? Chapter Y of series X already released, where is it?" These rips are purely the series I and JDS personally buy to read for ourselves as well as some series that have the second-most recent chapter available for free. That means that if a K Manga series is not included in these batches, we either don't buy/read it or it doesn't have recent free chapters.
* Batches are uploaded on Tuesday evening except for weeks when a Witch Hat Atelier chapter releases, then the upload is on Wednesday.
* For some series the title is so long that it exceeds the maximum path length, in this case (folder) names will be truncated. *(Example: the folder name for "I Was Reincarnated as the 7th Prince so I Can Take My Time Perfecting My Magical Ability" is simply "I Was Reincarnated as the 7th Prince.")*
* Previous batches can be found [here](https://nyaa.si/?f=0&c=3_1&q=weekly+k+manga+chapter+update).
* To search batches, use google with the following string: "site:nyaa.si weekly k manga {search query}". 
* If you want to add your purchases to these batches to share with others, let me know!
* For any questions or suggestions, leave a comment or message me on Discord.

title: [GLRemux] Pretty Guardian Sailor Moon (2003) (60fps)
description:
**Title:** Pretty Guardian Sailor Moon (2003) (60fps)
**Video Source:** Bunny Hat Raw - https://nyaa.si/view/556324
**Subtitle Source:** Miss Dream - https://nyaa.si/view/435218

I made these for a private watch group I run so we could enjoy PGSM in 60 FPS with subtitles, and figured I may as well share it with the world. I took the 60fps raw video and muxed it with Miss Dream's subs. The subtitles had to be offset a bit to get them to match. I did not fine-tune the sub timing to 100% perfection, but it is close enough, and I would say a lot of the time, it's near-perfect. There may be a few ms of imperfection on a few episodes, nothing major.

It really has that "soap opera" feel to the video, even moreso with the higher framerate. It is definitely a unique experience, not for everyone, but we had fun with it! I hope you do, too!

Thanks, of course, to Bunny Hat for supplying the raw video and to Miss Dream for the cute, styled subtitles!

title: [Malkav Animes] Eiji - Movie V2 [LD-RIP Port-BR]
description:
![alt text](https://i.imgur.com/GCbSp4n.jpeg "Logo Title Text 1")

Eiji é um Movie lançado em 1990 baseado no mangá de mesmo nome do autor Hisashi Eguchi, que já trabalhou como Character Design em animes como Mujin Wakusei Survive (Planet Survival), Perfect Blue e Roujin Z e dirigido por Mizuho Nishikubo (California Crisis / Digital Devil Monogatari Megami Tensei / Giovanni no Shima / Musashi: The Dream of the Last Samurai / Otogizoushi / Purple Eyes in the Dark / Video Girl Ai / Zillion).

O segundo filho de lendário boxeador Keijiro Akagi, Eiji, é um encrenqueiro escolar e pior guitarrista de rock do mundo. Embora seu pai e seu irmão mais velho sejam ambos boxeadores, ele odeia o esporte, mas de repente se interessa por box quando se encontra com a irmã do campeão local.

title: [Perevodildo] Rainbow Across the Pacific Ocean / Taiheiyou ni Kakeru Niji / 太平洋にかける虹 OVA (1992)
description:
![](https://i.imgur.com/dD4DNrf.png)
RAWs: Unknown (more on that later) 
Translation: Perevodildo 
Quality Checking: True Noobow Gamer

The video is what we concluded to be an HDTV rebroadcast recording, since there are no traces of a DVD/LD for this show. But even if it was aired in HD, it's safe to say that at least two layers of compression it's been through downscaled it back to 480p. How did it happen? Well, I found it on a certain streaming site. When I asked the uploader for the source, it turned out that he also snatched it from some Japanese guy's YouTube channel. As of December 2023, said channel was already terminated, so the trail goes cold there, and I had to settle for this video from VK. Still, even under two layers of compression, it blows previously available ARR's raws out of the Pacific Ocean. Kudos to Psychomorphosis for preserving it. On the downside, the interlacing is all over the place, but because it's been up- and down-scaled multiple times, our resident encoding guru advised against trying to fix it after a short examination, so I just cut the pillarboxing and downscaled it to 480p.

The story is a straightforward fairy tale-ish adaptation of Daisaku Ikeda's short anti-war story, pretty mid even compared to his other adaptions. Sometime in the late 80s, a Chinese elementary school student Gyokuren who transfers to Japan finds herself at odds with her new classmates. Mitsuko, one of her new classmates, finds an old American celluloid doll, whose backstory helps her establish contact with Gyokuren and help the latter open up to the rainbow across the Pacific. If you've watched the 1991 movie "Ushiro no Shoumen Daare," Kayoko there sings a song about an American celluloid doll at her farewell party. This OVA is largely centered around that song.
The [ED song](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=k0SMkMJge2U&ab_channel=%E9%95%B7%E5%B1%8B%E5%AD%A6) is rather nice too. 

[AniDB](https://anidb.net/perl-bin/animedb.pl?show=anime&aid=2408) | [DDL](https://t.me/+GDbKBqecLXBjNGM6) | [Subs only](https://github.com/Perevodildo/Perevodildo-softsubs/tree/main/Standalones) | [Blog post](https://perevodildo.blogspot.com/2024/09/rainbow-across-pacific-ocean-taiheiyou.html)

title: [AniMeitantei] Record of Ragnarok - The Apocalypse of the Gods (Chapter 1-2)
description:
This story is about the other side of those spectacular myths – about an apocalypse never before told. At the same time that Zeus announced the start of Ragnarok, as he made that declaration, a silver-haired man watched from the background. He complained about how the gerontocracy make a ruckus about everything before questioning why the Gods thought they could be so high and mighty. A few hours after the conference regarding mankind's survival, Zeus gathered all the Gods yet again. Standing on a podium, Zeus tells them that the reason they were all here was so he could announce to them the names of those who will fight for the Gods in Ragnarok. While a lot of the Gods get pumped and want to see, the God of the Sun, Ra-Horakhty, sighs about how he thought this was something important and he criticizes Zeus since he considers this to be the basest of matters. The "Strongest Goddess," Morrígan, notes how Zeus is putting on another spectacle before she says they already know who'll be fighting, confident she is one of the ones chosen.

| Chapters:        | Release Date :
| ------------- |:-------------:|
| Chapter 1 - The Apocalypse|2024.Jun.24 |
| Chapter 2 - Radiant Sun|2024.Jul.24 |

title: [4de] DEAD DEAD DEMONS DEDEDEDE DESTRUCTION - S01E14 (WEB 1080p) [Dual Audio]
description:
## What is this?
The CR release of this show has a ~~nice~~ ~~fine~~ script but it has weird technical issues-- Everything is timed to the dub audio and the script is *full* of linebreaks.
Also, all of the signs are hardsubbed. There are some seriously cool signs that only an official publisher would be able to do (the title cards/location names) and straight up Arial-with-stroke signs.

The script is fully retimed and ~~lightly~~ edited. [Here's a script comparison](https://www.diffchecker.com/lsWfcgIH/). The diff doesn't include all of the strange linebreaks that were removed.

All of the Arial signs were dehardsubbed, and the important ones were recreated in ASS.
We also included the dub and a signs track if that's what you're into.

For this episode, we spliced in the dub audio for another English part, hence the FLAC audio again.
The original audio is still available as an alternate track.

We're planning to keep up with this show as long as CR's timing is distractingly bad.

[MediaInfo](https://pastebin.com/raw/p2M1e6CF)

## Credits
Translation: Ocean Productions  
Editing/Timing/TS: Henry  
Encode: sgt  
Song TL: chron  
Lyrics: Ridley  
KFX: Zahuczky  
QC: Henry, sgt

tastySugar：

趁著新作的消息來重翻 ZEGAPAIN，大約每週做一集。還沒有看過本作的觀眾可以當做是在追番，每週追著看。

本作雖是 06 年的動畫，但裡面很多設定到現在也不過時。在補番時，我發現既存的字幕存在這樣或那樣的問題，本次重翻的主要目的在於將 ZEGAPAIN 世界複雜的設定盡可能完整地還原給觀眾們，因此在專有名詞的方面做了較大的改動。

香菜的配音非常可愛，非常推薦！

消されるな、この想い　忘れるな、我が痛み
